subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My Heart! That which thou didst write in mention of the solace of Mine eyes, Áqá Siyyid Ḥusayn, upon him rest the peace of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب فوادی اینکه در ذکر قره عین آقا سید حسین علیه سلام الله مرقوم داشتید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
